roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA, P & A FILED
DEF MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA, MEMO OF P&A, FILED

/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/INTRW: SPANISH/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 05-22-01 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA TO A  VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION  212,5(C), ENTERED 05-10-01, IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT CHARGING COUNT 2 AS A FELONY VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 236,/IRRC/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANG:2/TWS/X: PSR WAIVED,/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ364D/CTS:364/VF2:200/CTORD: PAY $30 ICNA/CTORD: PAY $40 COURT SECURITY FEE/CTORD: FINES AND FEES ARE DEEMED PAID IN FULL/OBEY/ACCEP/NUNCDAT: 05-10-01/DISM3/CTORD: PROBATION IS TERMINATED SUCCESSFULLY/X: NO ORDER WAS SUBMITTED FOR SIGNATURE AND FILING,//CTORD:PROBATION IN # 1969680 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS SUCCESSFUL/
/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ364D/CTS 99/WS/X:DEFENDANT MUST REGISTER PURSUANT TO 186,30PC,/X:DEFENDANT MUST ABIDE BY ALL GANG CONDITIONS,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/ACCEP/
